use_codes.desc: INDICATED IN COMBINATION WITH ENCORAFENIB FOR THE TREATMENT OF MELANOMA
INDICATED IN COMBINATION WITH ENCORAFENIB FOR THE TREATMENT OF MELANOMA MEDIATED BY A B-RAF PROTEIN KINASE
INDICATED IN COMBINATION WITH ENCORAFENIB FOR THE TREATMENT OF MELANOMA WITH A BRAF MUTATION
TREATMENT OF MELANOMA WITH A BRAF MUTATION

MEKTOVI IS A KINASE INHIBITOR INDICATED IN COMBINATION WITH ENCORAFENIB, FOR THE TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH METASTATIC NON SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER WITH A BRAF V600E MUTATION, AS DETECTED BY AN FDA-APPROVED TEST
